nasb.text: therefore I will give it into the hand of a despot of the nations; he will thoroughly deal with it. According to its wickedness I have driven it away.

esv.text: I will give it into the hand of a mighty one of the nations. He shall surely deal with it as its wickedness deserves. I have cast it out.

cnv.text: 我就把它交在列國中為首的人手中，他必定對付它；因著它的罪惡，我就把它驅逐出去。

ccb.text: 我要把它交在列国的首领手里，他必按照它的邪恶惩治它。我丢弃了它。
